hypothesis: Jointly optimizing a differentiable XRD similarity loss with a pretrained ML interatomic potential energy (e.g., CHGNet) as a weighted sum will smooth the effective loss landscape and increase StructureMatcher recovery rates for lattice and coordinate perturbations (σl, σc ≤ 0.1), yielding at least a 20 percentage-point improvement in mean match rate compared to XRD-only gradient descent.
